---
title: "Week 01: Toolkit setup"
---

## Introduction

Welcome to the first week of IS 4010! This week is all about building your foundation. We'll introduce the course philosophy of "AI-enhanced development," set up your professional developer toolkit, and dive into the world of version control with Git and GitHub. By the end of this module, you'll have a fully configured environment and your first repository ready to go.

## Recommended readings

- [Pro Git Book (Ch 1-3)](https://git-scm.com/book/en/v2) - The definitive guide to Git
- [GitHub Guides](https://guides.github.com/) - Essential tutorials for working with GitHub

## Lectures

- [**Slides: Course introduction & version control**](../slides/IS4010_W01_Introduction.qmd)

## Interactive notebooks

- {{< iconify bi github >}} [Open in GitHub](https://github.com/bgreenwell/is4010-course/blob/main/week01/week01.ipynb)
- {{< iconify bi google >}} [Open in Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/bgreenwell/is4010-course/blob/main/week01/week01.ipynb)

## Lab assignment

- [Lab 01: Git & GitHub fundamentals](https://github.com/bgreenwell/is4010-python/blob/main/week01/lab01.md)
